title: Odontochilus hydrocephalus
taxonomy: Odontochilus hydrocephalus is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a member of the genus Odontochilus, which is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae. The exact classification of Odontochilus hydrocephalus may vary depending on the source, but it is generally accepted to be a species within the family Orchidaceae. Odontochilus hydrocephalus is also known to be a part of the order Asparagales, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The classification of Odontochilus hydrocephalus is subject to ongoing research and revision as our understanding of plant taxonomy evolves.
